data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for assignment to a responsible party.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the assignment of punch list items to responsible parties, but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for assignment but lacks concrete evidence of its implementation or validation. Therefore, the requirement cannot be conclusively assessed based on the current evidence.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or entities for assignment to responsible parties.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the assignment of punch list items to responsible parties.
